---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Get in touch with Robin Lovelace"
title-block-banner: false
---

## Get in touch

Feel free to get in touch with me through any of these channels:

### Email
- **University**: [r.lovelace@leeds.ac.uk](mailto:r.lovelace@leeds.ac.uk)
- Find my work email online if directly related to my work

### GitHub
- [github.com/robinlovelace](https://github.com/robinlovelace)
- Comment on an existing issue or discussion, or create a new one
- I get a lot of software questions - asking on GitHub is best because:
  - You're likely to get a response quicker
  - Other people can benefit from the answer
  - I prioritize well-asked questions with reproducible examples

### Social Media
- Twitter/X: [Robin Lovelace on Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/robinlovelace)
- Mastodon: [Robin Lovelace on Fosstodon](https://fosstodon.org/web/@robinlovelace)
- YouTube: [RobinLovelace](https://www.youtube.com/c/RobinLovelace)

### Discord
Join the Geocompr Discord Server to ask questions about methods and technology:
[![discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/878051191374876683?label=discord&logo=Discord&color=blue)](https://discord.gg/PMztXYgNxp)

---

## Postal Address

Institute for Transport Studies  
University of Leeds  
Leeds LS2 9JT  
United Kingdom
